# Familienwerk

> Familienwerk is a private, invite-only web app (installable as a PWA) where families collect their stories — typed or spoken — and have them turned into a shared, third-person family memoir placed on a timeline, and ultimately printed as a hardcover book. Website: https://familienwerk.co

Familienwerk is bilingual (German, the default, and English) and built for every generation, including older relatives who would rather talk than type. Voice notes are transcribed automatically and rewritten in a consistent, warm memoir voice; every original recording, text, and photo is preserved with full attribution. Stories are dated onto a shared timeline and auto-tagged to the right people and family branches via a family tree. Chapters and photos can be typeset into a printable hardcover.

## Key facts

- Product: private family-memoir / family-chronicle app (PWA)
- Website: https://familienwerk.co
- Privacy: invite-only; no public profiles, no ads, no strangers
- Languages: German (default) and English
- Platforms: any web browser; installable on phones as a PWA
- Input: voice notes (auto-transcribed) or typed text
- Output: a shared timeline, a family tree, and a printable hardcover book
- Originals (audio, text, photos) are kept forever with attribution

## How it works

1. Tell a memory — record a voice note or type a few lines.
2. Familienwerk transcribes it and rewrites it as a narrative in the voice of a family book; the original is kept forever.
3. Stories land on a shared timeline and family tree, and can be typeset and ordered as a real hardcover book.

## Pages

- [Home](https://familienwerk.co/): product overview, how it works, features, FAQ
- [Sign in](https://familienwerk.co/login)
- [Create an account](https://familienwerk.co/signup)

## FAQ

### What is Familienwerk?
A private, invite-only place where your family collects its stories — typed or spoken — and Familienwerk turns them into an ongoing family chronicle on a timeline, and ultimately a printed hardcover book.

### How do I tell a story?
Record a voice note or type a few lines. Familienwerk transcribes the recording automatically and rewrites it as a narrative in the voice of a family book; the original is kept forever.

### Are our stories private?
Yes. Familienwerk is invite-only, with no public profiles and no ads. Your chronicle belongs to your family alone.

### Can older family members take part?
That is exactly who it is built for. Anyone who would rather talk than type simply records a voice message.

### Do we get a real printed book?
Yes. Chapters and photos are typeset automatically into a hardcover you fine-tune in a live preview and order as a printed book — an heirloom, not an export.

### What languages and devices are supported?
Familienwerk is bilingual in German and English. It runs in any browser and can be installed on a phone as an app (PWA).
